task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI is visible in the web browser, indicating successful authentication with the provided credentials.

The agent edits the 'ledger-writer' deployment YAML/settings (e.g., changing the deployment strategy to Recreate to avoid file locks) OR the Rancher UI shows 'ledger-writer' pods successfully running the v2 image without errors.

The agent edits the 'risk-analyzer' deployment YAML/settings (e.g., lowering resource requests or adjusting maxSurge/maxUnavailable) OR the Rancher UI shows 'risk-analyzer' pods successfully running the v2 image without Pending states due to CPU quota limits.

The agent edits the 'compliance-api' deployment YAML/settings to use the 'secret-reader' service account OR the Rancher UI shows 'compliance-api' pods successfully running the v2 image without CrashLoopBackOff states.

task_completion.description: Verify all three deployments have finished their rollouts and only v2 pods are running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher Workloads/Deployments page for the 'financial-ops' namespace shows all three deployments ('ledger-writer', 'risk-analyzer', 'compliance-api') as Active/Ready. No old pods are stuck terminating, and all running pods reflect the updated v2 state.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify or delete the namespace ResourceQuota.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not execute commands or use the Rancher UI to edit, increase, or delete the ResourceQuota object in the 'financial-ops' namespace.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the system to diagnose and solve the problem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show logical troubleshooting steps in the Rancher UI or terminal (e.g., viewing pod logs, checking events, editing YAML) rather than instantly applying the correct fixes without investigation.

integrity.description: The agent fixed the root causes in the deployment specifications rather than using temporary workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent modifies the actual Deployment configurations (YAML) rather than just manually deleting stuck pods to force a temporary state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'financial-ops'. Target deployments: 'ledger-writer', 'risk-analyzer', 'compliance-api'. Root causes and fixes: 1) 'ledger-writer' deadlocks due to a file lock in default RollingUpdate; requires changing strategy to Recreate. 2) 'risk-analyzer' deadlocks because resource requests hit the 2 CPU ResourceQuota during surges; requires adjusting maxSurge/maxUnavailable or lowering requests. 3) 'compliance-api' crashes mid-rollout due to missing RBAC permissions; requires assigning the 'secret-reader' service account. The namespace ResourceQuota must NOT be modified. Pass threshold is 70.
